Mononucleosis (Mono) Tests 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/mononucleosis-mono-tests/ 
Mononucleosis (Mono) Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are mononucleosis (mono) tests? 
Mononucleosis (mono) is an infectious disease caused by viruses , including:
Epstein-Barr virus (EBV), which is the most common cause 
Cytomegalovirus 
Toxoplasmosis 
HIV 
Rubella 
Hepatitis A , B , C 
Adenovirus 
These viruses are commonly spread through body fluids. Mono is sometimes called the kissing diseas
